visual_summary: A large-scale sunken Martian garden characterized by tiered palace terraces and central botanical features. The environment depicts a state of regal desolation, featuring dying Barsoomian flora within a landscape of terraced gardens and royal seating areas.
layout_notes: Large-scale terraced gardens with tiered palace terraces; includes royal seating areas and central botanical anchors.
lighting: Shifts from peaceful prosperity to dim, suffocating shadows caused by an increasingly thin, hypoxic atmosphere.
mood: Heavy sense of stillness, impending death, and hypoxic desolation.
constraints: Atmosphere must reflect thinning oxygen levels (hypoxic)
Visuals must transition from prosperity to suffocating shadows
unresolved_ambiguities: Specific botanical species of the "dying Barsoomian flora" are not defined.
Exact dimensions or total number of terrace tiers are unspecified.
